case_title: JACKELINE A. PARNELL VS. GKO CONSULTING ENGINEERS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT GKO CONSULTING ENGINEERS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARNELL, JACQUELINE A. INDIVIDUALLY & DBA KRP INFORMATION SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GKO CONSULTING ENGINEERS $9,149.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,789.13 INTEREST, $295.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,233.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX ) ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
